Save the date

Yen

Yang Wei

We kindly invite you to be present in our wedding

the 13th of February, 2027 at The St. Regis Langkawi, Malaysia.

the 13th of February, 2027 at The St. Regis Langkawi, Malaysia.

Mark your calendars, pack your dancing shoes, and get ready for a weekend full of laughter, dancing, memories, and a few happy tears.

How it all started

We met at an Indian restaurant in Shibuya, introduced by a mutual friend. Then COVID-19 happened, so I’ll always remember it was 2019.

A few years later, Yen said, “I want to move to Singapore,” so we packed up and moved countries.

A few years after that, I said, “I want to marry you,” and that’s how we ended up here in Langkawi. 💒

The important details

Date

Saturday, 13th of February, 2027

Date

Saturday, 13th of February, 2027

Time

Ceremony at 4pm, dinner at 7pm

Time

Ceremony at 4pm, dinner at 7pm

Location

The St. Regis Langkawi, Malaysia

Location

The St. Regis Langkawi, Malaysia

The order of events

Friday, Feb 12th

We are planning a welcome dinner for those who arrive this day, so come kick off the celebration with us!

3 pm: Guest check-in at the hotel/resort

6:30 pm: Welcome dinner

8 pm: Casual dinner and mingle

Saturday, Feb 13th

The big day! We can’t wait to share our vows with all of you, laugh, cry, and celebrate together. After the ceremony, there will be drinks, photos, and plenty of dancing. Tonight is all about love, joy, and making memories, we’re so glad you’ll be a part of it.

4:00 pm: Ceremony

5:30 pm: Cocktail hour & photos

7 pm: Reception: dinner, dancing, and celebration

Sunday, Feb 14th

Breakfast together. Checkout is at 12pm.

9:30 am: Breakfast together

12 pm: Checkout

Useful travel info

  • Logistics

    Langkawi International Airport (LGK) is about 20 minutes to The St. Regis Langkawi and nearby hotels

    Taxis, Grab (ride-share), and private transfers are easy to arrange

  • Weather tips

    February in Langkawi is hot and humid, with occasional showers

    Pack light, breathable outfits + a light jacket

    Comfortable shoes and sun protection recommended

  • Accommodation

    We’ve secured group rates at The St. Regis Langkawi and the connected Westin Langkawi (a few minutes apart by buggy).

    Baseline group rates for the nights of 12 & 13 Feb: St. Regis ROH RM1,300/night · Westin ROH RM680/night. Yen is doing her best to secure better rates — let us know if you’d like to extend.

  • Tourism

    Things to visit in the area:

    Langkawi Sky Bridge

    Eagle Square (Dataran Lang)

    Cenang Beach & Night Market

    Kilim Geoforest Park & mangrove tours

  • Wedding day transportation

    Wedding day shuttles will be provided from select hotels

    Private drivers can be arranged through hotels

    Taxis & Grab are affordable and widely available.

  • More info

    Malaysia uses the Malaysian Ringgit (MYR). Most places accept cards, but cash is handy for markets.

    Electrical outlets are Type A/C (a universal adapter works best)

    Tipping isn't expected, but always appreciated
